### Please read this first

- Have you checked the README and docs?
- Have you searched existing issues for related questions?

### Question

Describe what you are trying to understand or decide.

### Context

Include relevant code snippets, service topology, RabbitMQ/Redis setup, Studio
deployment details, or error output.

### Affected area

Mark all that apply:

- [ ] SDK
- [ ] Studio backend
- [ ] Studio frontend
- [ ] RabbitMQ
- [ ] Redis
- [ ] Workflow
- [ ] Observability / execution graphs
- [ ] MCP
- [ ] Packaging / installation
